Now Hiring – Rajahmundry / East Godavari

Medical Representative Jobs in Rajahmundry, East Godavari

Crasenim Pharma is hiring experienced Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Rajahmundry and East Godavari district. A major commercial city with strong prescription volumes, Rajahmundry offers an excellent territory for ambitious pharma field professionals.

📍 Rajahmundry & East Godavari 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 Experienced MRs Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

The Rajahmundry Pharma Market

Rajahmundry is one of the most commercially significant cities in AP, situated on the Godavari river in East Godavari district. It hosts a large GP and specialist network, with strong private hospital presence across internal medicine, orthopaedics, cardiology, and gastroenterology — all high-prescribing areas for Crasenim Pharma's product portfolio.

An MR's territory in Rajahmundry typically covers the city itself plus Rajanagaram, Kovvur, Nidadavole, and surrounding mandals — a geographically manageable area with excellent prescription potential.

Key Market Areas – Rajahmundry

Rajahmundry City, Rajanagaram, Kovvur, Nidadavole, Tanuku (extended), Bhadrachalam Road area

  • Large private hospital cluster — RIMS, Annapurna, and other major chains
  • Strong specialist base: cardiologists, chest physicians, diabetologists
  • High antibiotic, gastric, and cardiac prescription volumes
  • Good pharmacy distribution network throughout the city
  • Rajanagaram and Kovvur as growing sub-market opportunities
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Rajahmundry

Medical Representative – Rajahmundry
📍 Rajahmundry, East Godavari💼 Full-Time🕒 1–4 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma medicines to GPs, specialists, and hospitals in Rajahmundry
  • Cover Rajahmundry city and assigned surrounding mandals (Rajanagaram, Kovvur)
  • Competitive base salary with monthly prescription incentives and travel allowance
  • Full product training and detailing support from HQ
Commission-Based MR – Rajahmundry / East Godavari
📍 Rajahmundry / Kovvur / Nidadavole💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on every prescription of Crasenim Pharma products in Rajahmundry
  • Flexible role — operate from your existing pharma network in East Godavari
  • No initial investment required
  • Monthly target bonuses for consistent performance
FAQs

MR Jobs in Rajahmundry – FAQ

Does Crasenim Pharma have MR openings in East Godavari?
Yes. We have both full-time and commission-based Medical Representative openings in Rajahmundry and the broader East Godavari district, including sub-territories around Rajanagaram, Kovvur, and Nidadavole.
What is the commission structure for MRs in Rajahmundry?
Commission rates are based on product category and monthly prescription volume generated. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss the current Rajahmundry territory commission package in detail.
How do I apply for a pharma job in Rajahmundry?
WhatsApp your name, experience, and district to +91 99890 74806, or submit the form on our Careers page.
